name: openclaude-vscode
description: Sleek VS Code extension for OpenClaude with a visual Control Center, Microsoft Foundry / Azure OpenAI settings, and terminal-aligned theme.

commands.title: OpenClaude: Set Azure / Foundry API Key (Secret Storage)
OpenClaude: Clear Azure / Foundry API Key

openclaude.launchCommand.description: Command run in the integrated terminal when launching OpenClaude.

openclaude.terminalName.description: Integrated terminal tab name for OpenClaude sessions.

openclaude.useOpenAIShim.description: Set CLAUDE_CODE_USE_OPENAI=1 when launching, if you are not using a saved .openclaude-profile.json or Azure injection. When Azure chat injection is enabled, the shim is always turned on for that terminal.

openclaude.azure.enabled.description: When true, launch injects Microsoft Foundry / Azure OpenAI-compatible chat settings (OPENAI_* + AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION) into the OpenClaude terminal.

openclaude.azure.endpoint.markdownDescription: Azure resource base URL for OpenAI-compatible chat (example: `https://YOUR_RESOURCE.openai.azure.com` or Foundry inference endpoint). Do not include `api-version`; use **OpenClaude: Azure API Version**.

openclaude.azure.apiVersion.description: Azure API version query parameter passed to chat completions (AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION).

openclaude.azure.deployment.markdownDescription: Deployment name in Azure (maps to `OPENAI_MODEL` for the OpenAI shim).

openclaude.azure.forceAzureUrlStyle.description: Sets OPENAI_AZURE_STYLE=1 so deployment URLs and api-key header work even when the hostname is not auto-detected (recommended for Foundry).

openclaude.azure.apiKey.markdownDescription: Optional API key in settings (not recommended). Prefer **OpenClaude: Set Azure / Foundry API Key** to store the key in Secret Storage. If both are set, the secret wins.
